name: Missed a week of work after forklift hit me does comp pay?

mainEntity.name: Missed a week of work after forklift hit me does comp pay?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, temporary total disability pays ~66% wages after 3-day waiting period in Utah.** Covers lost time.[3] Key factors: Doctor excuses work, submit wage stubs. Permanent partial adds later if impaired.[3] Track all missed pay.
